brief.user_prompt: A cinematic wide shot of a woman walking through a neon-lit Tokyo alley at night, rain-slicked street, reflections, shallow depth of field

workflow.reasoning: Standard Flux Dev txt2img — no controlnet or inpainting required. User wants high quality, so full dev model over schnell.

prompt.positive: A cinematic wide shot of a woman walking through a neon-lit Tokyo alley at night, rain-slicked street, vivid reflections on wet pavement, shallow depth of field, volumetric light, film grain, anamorphic bokeh

metadata.notes: Local inference, zero API cost. Handing off to Claude for workflow JSON assembly and QA.
